title: Stranger Things Mobs
description: Replaces a few mobs with Stranger Things monsters, including custom animations
body:
This pack replaces a few mobs with Stranger Things Monsters!\
They even have custom animations (most of them are idle ones – you have to look closely!)
Replaced mobs:

- Evoker – Vecna
- Warden – Demogorgon
- Mind Flayer – Ghast
- Demodog – Spider

Note that this pack is experimental and may contain bugs!

Requires either [OptiFine](https://optifine.net/home) or [ETF](https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures) and [EMF](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features) to work!
